items.title: [CISA KEV] LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin - LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-54420
廠商: LiteSpeed
產品: cPanel Plugin
漏洞名稱: LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following Vulnerability
說明: LiteSpeed cPanel plugin contains a UNIX symbolic link (Symlink) following vulnerability that could allow a user with FTP or web shell access on a shared hosting server running CloudLinux/CageFS.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-18
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

items.title: [CISA KEV] Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager - Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Directory or Path Traversal Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-20262
廠商: Cisco
產品: Catalyst SD-WAN Manager
漏洞名稱: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Directory or Path Traversal Vulnerability
說明: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains a directory or path traversal vulnerability that could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to create a file or overwrite any file on the filesystem of an affected system.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-29
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown
